title: Silicone Door Bumpers,6x2mm Mini Buffer Furniture Pads,Rubber Feet Bumper Pads,Clear Adhesive Door Bumpers Protector Furniture Door Drawers for Furniture Glass Tables Crafts Wall Protectors (50pcs)
features: Silicone bumper pads: made of high quality silicone, transparent in colour, with strong self-adhesive properties and long lasting protection, can be applied to glass, ceramic, plastic, metal and other surfaces.
Function: These bumper pads reduce the noise of drops, knocks and closures. Stick to any furniture or household items to avoid slipping, scratching or rubbing.
Transparent design: the colour is transparent, which means that it does not interfere with your interior design and furniture use and is difficult to spot.
Size: each silicone bumper has a diameter of 0.6 cm / 0.2", is small, transparent and lightweight. Clean the surface before use to obtain maximum adhesion.
Wide range of uses: with noise reduction, anti-vibration, anti-slip, anti-collision and anti-scratch functions, widely used for glass, tables, desks, doors, railings, drawers, cabinets, etc.
description: Product description Features. These cushions reduce the noise of drops, knocks and closures. Stick to any furniture or household item to avoid slipping, scratching or rubbing. With noise reduction, anti-shock, anti-slip, anti-bump and anti-scratch functions, they are widely used on glass, tables, desks, doors, railings, drawers, cabinets, etc. Specifications. Material: silicone Colour: Transparent Quantity: 50 pieces Size: approx. 0.6cm/0.2"" diameter Packaging includes. Pack of 50 silicone bumper pads Safety Warning Make sure the surface is clean and dry before application to avoid any accidents.
